title: cousinia khorramabadensis var. purpurea
intro: Cousinia khorramabadensis var. purpurea is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Iran. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cousinia khorramabadensis var. purpurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
